config.heading: RENDERING SERVICES ACROSS CANBERRA
config.intro: From full exterior render transformations to textured coatings, cement render, acrylic render and patch repairs, AAM1 Coating Services helps Canberra properties look cleaner, sharper and built to last.

items.title: Exterior Render
items.description: Give tired brick, blueboard or cement sheet a clean modern finish with professional exterior rendering.

items.title: Texture Coating
items.description: Create depth, protection and street appeal with premium texture coatings. A great choice for new builds.

items.title: Commercial Rendering
items.description: Professional rendering and texture coatings for large-scale building exteriors across Canberra.

items.title: Venetian Plaster
items.description: Add a luxury designer finish with handcrafted Venetian plaster. Perfect for feature walls, bathrooms and premium spaces.
